approved_by: human governance decision following SYNTH review

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

changes.change: Removed open decision D3 and its confidence-map entry; test-tool-version selection is no longer a governance gate.
changes.justification: D3 concerned implementation tool versions, not repository understanding. A governance-level block on E1 was inconsistent with the expedition's nature as foundation/toolchain. Approved explicitly.

changes.change: E1 gained expedition_local_decisions note carrying the former D3 concern as local implementation guidance.
changes.justification: Preserves the concern (tool versions must be chosen during E1) without elevating it to governance state.

changes.change: Added reconciliation R5 documenting the authored artifact-ID collision in API-002.md.txt and the registry normalization/disambiguation rule applied during initialization.
changes.justification: Surface a hidden authored inconsistency as tracked governance rather than an implementation detail; no modification of the knowledge artifact.

changes.change: Added collision_resolution_rules object; updated TASKPRO-API-001 and TASKPRO-API-002 entries with explicit normalization/disambiguation notes and R5 reference.
changes.justification: Make future extraction deterministic: the registry now documents why API-001 was normalized and API-002 was disambiguated by filename.

changes.change: Regenerated derived view: removed D3 from open governance items, added R5, updated cross-references.
changes.justification: Derived projection must stay consistent with .synth/ state; .synth/ remains authoritative.

invariants_verified: knowledge/ untouched: input snapshot hash identical to genesis-0001.
No implementation capabilities invoked (no codegen, scaffold, install, migrate, compile).
Every change attributable to an explicit approved governance decision.
All assertions retain provenance (evidence_sources, derivation_type, confidence).
Authored artifacts under knowledge/ were not modified.
